title: ボーノなレースに必要なもの！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while we're devising a strategy for the
Mile Ch., Hishi Akebono calls out to me
excitedly.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look, Trainer! Taiki is on TV!

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle has been making a name for herself
over the past year. In fact, her growth is showing
no signs of slowing down.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narration
text_block_list.text:
What's the driving force behind her success, you
ask? Why, it's her desire to overcome a certain
racer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's right! My goal is to take down Hishi
Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I went all out preparin' for the last Sprinters S. so I
could ensure my victory!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I trained every day from dawn till dusk and did
pair running with different friends of mine!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I cut out all my snacks too and exercised until I
was nothin' but muscles!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But I still didn't win! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It sucks real bad right now, but I'm still havin' a
lot of fun! I swear I won't lose the next one,
though!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even through the screen, I can tell Taiki Shuttle is
stronger and faster than she was during the
Sprinters S. last month.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hoists me over her shoulder in an instant and
takes off running. This time, I already know where
we're going.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And I find I'm correct as we skid into the kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: My size is my strength!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm so powerful and can deal with
getting blocked on the track so well!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Which means if I bulk up and get even more muscular, I'll be more powerful than ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Status quo notwithstanding, I'm not sure her legs
can handle the strain if she gets any larger than
she is now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The very thought sends a thread of anxiety
through me. However...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to get so big and strong that I'll be able to
beat Taiki Shuttle without a doubt!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I decided to race my way, and I wanna go all-out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. We already made the decision
together, so now's the time to take action.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now that that's out of the way, I'll make
us poached chicken and broccoli salad for lunch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono starts cooking right away. She sets
a pot of water to boil, then begins slicing up
chicken breast meat.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The trick is to poke holes in the meat with a fork
and massage it well with salt and sake.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
After that, let it rest for a while. In the meantime,
we can make the sauce.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll use soy sauce, sugar, sake, and sesame
oil today! Oh! I can't forget to mince some white
onions while I'm at it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She mixes the sauce and slices cucumbers to act
as a base for the rest of the food. The water starts
boiling while she's cutting the broccoli.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I gotta sprinkle on the starch! Not too much
at a time, now... Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Next, it's time to poach the chicken.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It has to cook all the way through to be safe to
eat, but it'll get too chewy if it gets overcooked.
It's a tough balance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then scoops out the cooked chicken breasts
and cools them in a bowl of ice water.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the meat has cooled, she drains the water
and puts the finishing touches on the broccoli
salad. And just like that...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Soup's on! Ta-dah! Presenting a heaping helping
of poached chicken and broccoli salad! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small mountain of food gets plopped down in
front of me with a thud.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Enjoy, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Here's to our next victory! I'll win it with my—no, with our very own running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chicken and broccoli couldn't be more
perfect, and the two of us practically devour it
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before long, the plates are empty.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Whew! I'm full to bursting! That was so tasty! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that we both have fuel in our tanks, it's time
to hash out a plan moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take out my training handbook to look up what
kind of strength training is effective for building
muscles, when I hear giggling.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, nothing. It's just, well...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It almost feels like with the two of us together, we
could do anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that, we ramp up training even more to
reach the victory in our sights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as the Mile Ch. draws closer, a reporter
comes to do an interview with Hishi Akebono.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Who's my rival? It's Taiki Shuttle, of course. ☆

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Really! Wow, this is a showdown between fated
rivals, then, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm training hard right now so I can race
Taiki at my very best!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I've put on lots and lots of muscle too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Look!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono barely finishes speaking when I
feel my feet leave the ground.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Upsy-daisy!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I can't believe how easily you're able to lift
up your trainer with one arm...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Correct me if I'm wrong, but you're a full size
bigger than you were at the Sprinters S., aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll be more powerful than ever on the track, so
look forward to it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's the first challenge Hishi Akebono has ever
publicly issued, and it becomes the talk of the
town in no time.
